name: SRx Health Solutions, Inc.
summary: Our History SRx Health Solutions Inc. (SRx or the Company) is the successor reporting entity following a reverse merger with Better Choice Company, Inc. (Better Choice or BTTR), the pet health and wellness business. Historically, SRx was engaged in specialty pharmaceuticals and healthcare services, including a series of acquisitions to expand its operations.
